title: Union Pacific Corporation Executives to Address the UBS Global Industrials and Transportation Conference
text: OMAHA, Neb. , May 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jennifer Hamann, executive vice president and chief financial officer, and Kenny Rocker, executive vice president – marketing and sales, of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP), will address the UBS Global Industrials and Transportation Conference on Tuesday, June 7, 2022, at 8:00 a.m.

title: Rail shippers applaud federal appeals court ruling on alleged price fixing
text: Attorneys representing shippers in litigation involving four Class I railroads praised a federal appeals court decision this week that clarified what evidence can be submitted in two cases involving alleged price fixing in the early 2000s.  Stephen Neuwirth, an attorney with Quinn Emanuel Urqhuart & Sullivan, said in a statement that the “opinion will greatly assist the shippers in making their antitrust case against the railroads.

title: Union Pacific and Two Other Railroads Are Downgraded. There Are Better Values in Transport Stocks.
text: Citigroup analyst Christian Wetherbee downgrades shares of Union Pacific, CSX and Norfolk Southern.

title: Union Pacific Looks Attractive With 5 Positive Trends
text: Union Pacific has recently exhibited five positive trends that make its stock look attractive at current prices. The five trends are steady-to-growing volumes in the first 18 weeks of the year, higher pricing, a fuel surcharge, a dividend over 2%, and a stock buyback program.

title: Union Pacific (UNP) Cheers Investors With 10% Dividend Hike
text: Union Pacific's (UNP) consistent measures to reward its shareholders through dividends and share buybacks are encouraging.

title: Union Pacific's board raises dividend by 10%
text: Union Pacific Corp. UNP, +0.92% said late Thursday its board has voted to increase the railroad's quarterly dividend by 10% to $1.30 a share. The dividend is payable on June 30 to shareholders of record May 31, the company said.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Announces 10% Dividend Increase for Second Quarter 2022
text: OMAHA, Neb. , May 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) announced that its Board of Directors today voted to increase the quarterly dividend on the Company's common shares by 10% to $1.30 per share.
